title: 2D struct array parameter not treated as constant in generate-if

features.name: 2D packed struct array parameter in generate-if condition
features.description: Code should include a parameter declared as a 2D unpacked array of packed struct type, used in a generate-if condition with genvar indexing to access a struct member

features.name: packed struct typedef
features.description: Code should include a typedef of a packed struct with logic members
features.snippet: typedef struct packed { logic enable_feature; } unit_config_t;

features.name: nested generate for loop with genvar
features.description: Code should include nested generate for loops using genvar variables
features.snippet:
for (genvar i = 0; i < 4; i++) begin : top_unit
  for (genvar j = 0; j < 2; j++) begin : sub_unit
  end
end
